title: Three die in SANParks chalet blaze in forest
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Three people died in a mystery...
bodyText:
KNYSNA NEWS - Three people died in a mystery fire at an upmarket tree top chalet in the Garden Route National Park in Harkerville Forest on Thursday 18 July.

Western Cape SAPS spokesperson Sergeant Christopher Spies said the circumstances surrounding the tragedy are being investigated.


> The cause of the fire is yet to be established, he said.


This is a developing story.

Read more on www.knysnaplettherald.com

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
